creator: bobf@mrp3.com
text:
Reference: 219099 which has been marked 'Closed Overcome by Events'

Please re-open 219099 or address with this bug report.

It has been over a year now since the patent has expired for the mp3 encoding performed by audio/lame.

According to the Audacity web site, the patent licensing restriction is no longer an issue

https://manual.audacityteam.org/man/lame_legal_issues.html

As such it should be ok to remove the patent restrictions in line 17 of Makefile:

RESTRICTED= patent issues

This will allow the package to build, preventing any package dependency difficulties with other packages, such as mencoder.
